text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Mucolipidosis type IV ( MLIV ; MIM 252650 ) is an autosomal recessive lysosomal storage disorder that is characterized by corneal clouding , delayed psychomotor development , and mental retardation that usually presents during the first year of life [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Another interesting clinical characteristic is that patients are constitutively achlorhydric with associated hypergastremia [ 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Patients with MLIV do not show mucopolysaccharide excretion , skeletal changes , or organomegaly like the other mucolipidoses .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abnormal lysosomal storage bodies and large vacuoles have been found in skin and conjuctival biopsies using electron - microscopy and , prior to gene identification , served as the only means of diagnosis [ 3 - 5 ] .
label: O B-GO O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A recent report estimates that the carrier frequency of MLIV in the Ashkenazi Jewish population is 1 in 100 , and mutations have been reported in Jewish and non - Jewish families [ 6 - 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The human gene MCOLN1 ( GenBank # AF287270 ) maps to chromosome 19p13 . 2 - 13 . 3 and encodes a novel protein that is a member of the transient receptor potential ( TRP ) cation channel gene superfamily [ 7 - 10 ] .
label: O B-Taxon B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Protein trafficking studies suggest that MLIV is the result of a defect in the late endocytic pathway , contrary to the other mucolipidoses which are typically caused by defective lysosomal hydrolases [ 11 , 12 ] .
label: B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O

text_a: Recent work in Caenorhabditis elegans supports this hypothesis .
label: O O O B-Taxon I-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Loss of function mutants of the MCOLN1 C . elegans homologue , cup - 5 , result in an increased rate of endocytosis , accumulation of large vacuoles , and a decreased rate of endocytosed protein breakdown ; while over - expression of this gene reverses the phenotype [ 13 ] .
label: O O O B-SO O O B-GGP B-Taxon I-Taxon I-Taxon B-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Cloning and characterization of the mouse homologue of MCOLN1 is crucial for the development of mouse models of MLIV to further study this disorder .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Many members of the animal kingdom display coat or skin color differences along their dorsoventral axis .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To determine the mechanisms that control regional differences in pigmentation , we have studied how a classical mouse mutation , droopy ear ( deH ) , affects dorsoventral skin characteristics , especially those under control of the Agouti gene .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Mice carrying the Agouti allele black - and - tan ( at ) normally have a sharp boundary between dorsal black hair and yellow ventral hair ; the deH mutation raises the pigmentation boundary , producing an apparent dorsal - to - ventral transformation .
label: B-Taxon O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We identify a 216 kb deletion in deH that removes all but the first exon of the Tbx15 gene , whose embryonic expression in developing mesenchyme correlates with pigmentary and skeletal malformations observed in deH / deH animals .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Construction of a targeted allele of Tbx15 confirmed that the deH phenotype was caused by Tbx15 loss of function .
label: O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O

text_a: Early embryonic expression of Tbx15 in dorsal mesenchyme is complementary to Agouti expression in ventral mesenchyme ; in the absence of Tbx15 , expression of Agouti in both embryos and postnatal animals is displaced dorsally .
label: O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Transplantation experiments demonstrate that positional identity of the skin with regard to dorsoventral pigmentation differences is acquired by E12 . 5 , which is shortly after early embryonic expression of Tbx15 .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O

text_a: Fate - mapping studies show that the dorsoventral pigmentation boundary is not in register with a previously identified dermal cell lineage boundary , but rather with the limb dorsoventral boundary .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Embryonic expression of Tbx15 in dorsolateral mesenchyme provides an instructional cue required to establish the future positional identity of dorsal dermis .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These findings represent a novel role for T - box gene action in embryonic development , identify a previously unappreciated aspect of dorsoventral patterning that is widely represented in furred mammals , and provide insight into the mechanisms that underlie region - specific differences in body morphology .

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: A fundamental question in developmental biology is how adjacent regions of the vertebrate body acquire differences in their appearance or morphology .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Mechanisms that establish the general body plan make use of a relatively small number of signaling pathways shared among all animals ( reviewed in Pires - daSilva and Sommer 2003 ) , but the extent to which these pathways control finer differences between body regions is not clear .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Among vertebrates , differences in the shape or number of skeletal elements , altered morphology of epidermal appendages , and variation in pigment distribution combine to produce the majority of what distinguishes one animal from another .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Among these , pigment patterns are an excellent system to investigate how morphological differences arise , both for different regions of the body within a species and for different animals from closely related species .
label: O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: In natural environments , color variation is a nearly universal mechanism for recognition , camouflage , or both ; consequently , a large number of pigment patterns have been characterized from an evolutionary and ecological perspective ( Boughman 2001 ; Jiggins et al . 2001 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In the laboratory , color variation has been the subject of vertebrate genetics for more than a century ( Searle 1968 ; Silvers 1979 ) , and many pigmentary components have been identified whose actions are understood in a cellular or organ - based context ( reviewed in Bennett and Lamoreux 2003 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Several mechanisms may contribute to regional differences in vertebrate pigmentation .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: In the embryo , alterations in the determination or migration of melanoblasts from the neural crest affect the number or distribution of pigment cells in the skin ( reviewed in Reedy et al . 1998 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Within hair follicles , paracrine signals control the type of pigment made in specific regions of the body or at specific times during the hair cycle ( reviewed in Furumura et al . 1996 ; Barsh et al . 2000 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Finally , movement of pigment granules within melanocytes or from melanocytes to keratinocytes makes use of cellular machinery that is shared by a variety of cell types , but that can vary in different regions of the body ( reviewed in Marks and Seabra 2001 ) .
label: O O O O B-GO I-GO O B-CL O O B-CL O B-CL O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , for all of these mechanisms -- white spotting , pigment - type switching , and melanosome biogenesis -- more is known about the identity of the molecular components than their spatial and temporal control .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: One of the most obvious aspects of regional color variation in vertebrates is a dark dorsal surface juxtaposed to a light ventral surface , apparent in the color of skin , scales , feathers , or hair , in which the boundary between dorsal and ventral compartments is often sharp and lies in register with the limbs .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In rodents and probably other mammals , this dorsoventral difference in hair color is brought about by differences in pigment type as determined by allelic variation of the Agouti gene ( Bultman et al . 1992 ; Miller et al . 1993 ) .
label: O B-Taxon O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Secreted by dermal papilla cells within each hair follicle ( Millar et al . 1995 ) , Agouti protein causes melanocytes in that follicle to switch from the production of brown / black eumelanin to red / yellow pheomelanin .
label: O O B-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-CHEBI O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Agouti protein has a short radius of action ( Silvers and Russel 1955 ) and can be switched on and off during a single hair cycle ( Bultman et al . 1992 , 1994 ; Miller et al . 1993 ; Vrieling et al . 1994 ) ; thus , its regulated expression is thought to be responsible for the cream - colored or yellow ventral surface of mice carrying the black - and - tan ( at ) allele and for the yellow markings around the feet , ears , or head , i . e . , tan points or head spots , of certain dog breeds .

text_a: A hair cycle - specific transcript is expressed in both dorsal and ventral skin for 2 - 3 days during early hair growth , while a ventral - specific transcript is expressed throughout the entire period of active hair growth , but only in ventral skin ( Bultman et al . 1994 ; Vrieling et al . 1994 ) .

label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Normal post - squalene cholesterol biosynthesis is important for mammalian embryonic development .
label: O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Neonatal mice lacking functional dehydrocholesterol Delta 7 - reductase ( Dhcr7 ) , a model for the human disease of Smith - Lemli - Opitz syndrome , die within 24 hours of birth .
label: O B-Taxon O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although they have a number of biochemical and structural abnormalities , one cause of death is from apparent respiratory failure due to developmental pulmonary abnormalities .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: In this study , we characterized further the role of cholesterol deficiency in lung development of these mice .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Significant growth retardation , beginning at E14 . 5 ~ E16 . 5 , was observed in Dhcr7 - / - embryos .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: Normal lobation but smaller lungs with a significant decrease in lung - to - body weight ratio was noted in Dhcr7 - / - embryos , compared to controls .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Lung branching morphogenesis was comparable between Dhcr7 - / - and controls at early stages , but delayed saccular development was visible in all Dhcr7 - / - embryos from E17 . 5 onwards .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Impaired pre - alveolar development of varying severity , inhibited cell proliferation , delayed differentiation of type I alveolar epithelial cells ( AECs ) and delayed vascular development were all evident in knockout lungs .

label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: Our data indicated that cholesterol deficiency caused by Dhcr7 nan was associated with a distinct lung saccular hypoplasia , characterized by failure to terminally differentiate alveolar sacs , a delayed differentiation of type I AECs and an immature vascular network at late gestational stages .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The molecular mechanism of impaired lung development associated with sterol deficiency by Dhcr7 loss is still unknown , but these results do not support the involvement of dysregulated Shh - Patched - Gli pathway in causing this defect .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background

text_a: Cholesterol is a necessary membrane constituent of all mammalian , reptile and avian cells , as well as a few other organisms , but not all eukaryotic organisms .
label: B-CHEBI O O O B-GO O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O B-Taxon B-CL O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon I-Taxon O

text_a: In the latter cases , such as plants and fungi , cholesterol - like sterols ( phytosterols , ergosterol etc . ) seem to substitute for cholesterol .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: The precise need for sterols in biological membranes still remains poorly defined , though its link with microdomains ( variously termed rafts , caveoli etc . ) may be part of the answer [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although the accumulation of cholesterol in atherosclerotic plaques has led to the concept that ' too much ' cholesterol may be deleterious , too little cholesterol has now been proven pathophysiological for abnormal embryonic development .
label: O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Smith - Lemli - Opitz syndrome ( SLOS , MIM 270400 ) , a relative common dysmorphology disorder , is caused by mutations in DHCR7 [ 2 - 5 ] , which encodes for 7 - dehydrocholesterol Delta 7 - reductase and catalyzes a final step of cholesterol biosynthesis .

text_a: Recognition of other dysmorphology syndromes caused by defects in the post - squalene cholesterol biosynthesis pathway , such as desmosterolosis , lathosterolosis , X - linked chondrodysplasia punctanta and CHILD syndrome [ 6 - 15 ] , has strengthened this concept .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Genetic disruption of the Dhcr7 results in neonatal lethality [ 16 ] .

text_a: Mammalian lung is unique in that it is fully developed , but does not function for gas exchange until at the moment of birth ; the majority of structural development and maturation takes place in utero .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Lung development is a complex process that involves branching morphogenesis of epithelium , interstitial development including vasculogenesis , cellular differentiation , biochemical maturation and physical growth .

text_a: Four stages of mouse lung development have been described , based upon the histological appearances of lung ; pseudoglandular , canalicular , terminal saccular and alveolar stages [ 19 ] .

text_a: Dopamine D2 receptors mediate two - odor discrimination and reversal learning in C57BL / 6 mice
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Dopamine modulation of neuronal signaling in the frontal cortex , midbrain , and striatum is essential for processing and integrating diverse external sensory stimuli and attaching salience to environmental cues that signal causal relationships , thereby guiding goal - directed , adaptable behaviors .
label: B-CHEBI O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: At the cellular level , dopamine signaling is mediated through D1 - like or D2 - like receptors .
label: O O B-CL O O B-CHEBI O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Although a role for D1 - like receptors in a variety of goal - directed behaviors has been identified , an explicit involvement of D2 receptors has not been clearly established .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: To determine whether dopamine D2 receptor - mediated signaling contributes to associative and reversal learning , we compared C57Bl / 6J mice that completely lack functional dopamine D2 receptors to wild - type mice with respect to their ability to attach appropriate salience to external stimuli ( stimulus discrimination ) and disengage from inappropriate behavioral strategies when reinforcement contingencies change ( e . g . reversal learning ) .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: Mildly food - deprived female wild - type and dopamine D2 receptor deficient mice rapidly learned to retrieve and consume visible food reinforcers from a small plastic dish .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , both genotypes readily learned to dig through the same dish filled with sterile sand in order to locate a buried food pellet .
label: O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: However , the dopamine D2 receptor deficient mice required significantly more trials than wild - type mice to discriminate between two dishes , each filled with a different scented sand , and to associate one of the two odors with the presence of a reinforcer ( food ) .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: In addition , the dopamine D2 receptor deficient mice repeatedly fail to alter their response patterns during reversal trials where the reinforcement rules were inverted .
label: O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: Inbred C57Bl / 6J mice that develop in the complete absence of functional dopamine D2 receptors are capable of olfaction but display an impaired ability to acquire odor - driven reinforcement contingencies .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , the ability of dopamine D2 receptor deficient mice to adjust their responding to a previously reinforced stimulus when unexpected outcomes are encountered is significantly impaired .
label: O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These findings suggest that signaling mediated by the dopamine D2 receptor is important for regulating associative and reversal learning and may have implications for the treatment of human attention disorders .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Reinforcement - mediated associative learning , or the ability to ascribe deterministic relationships between environmental stimuli that signal the probability of receiving a primary reinforcer ( e . g . food ) , has been divided into 3 components or stages [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The first , unlearned stage is the organism ' s experience with a primary reinforcer that elicits some unlearned / innate physiological response ( e . g . palatability of a food or satiety ) .
label: O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: The second phase involves the attachment of salience to external stimuli ( discriminative stimuli ) that signal whether the delivery of a primary reinforcer will or will not occur based on some emitted behavior ( e . g . a rodent lever presses for food pellets only when a stimulus light is illuminated in an operant chamber ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Finally , there is the maintenance of associative learning relationships over time ( a stimulus light always signifies a food pellet is available subsequent to a lever press ) [ see refs . [ 1 , 2 ] for review ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Carlsson and colleagues [ 35 ] have speculated that dopamine D2R stimulation in the striatum serves to brake or diminish excitatory corticostriatal signaling and plasticity .

text_a: Indeed , perseverative behavior is associated with over activity of the dorsal striatum in rodents [ 36 ] and over activity of the caudate in patients with ADHD [ 37 ] and a strong inverse correlation of D2R binding with compulsive behavior has been reported [ 22 ] .

text_a: Importantly , our data indicate that the poor performances displayed by the D2R - / - mice are manifestations of reversal learning deficits and not gross motivational or sensory impairments .

text_a: Conclusions
label: O

text_a: This study demonstrates that signaling by dopamine D2Rs does not mediate the hedonic value of reinforcers , supporting and refining earlier findings [ 1 , 2 ] .

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Examination of ancient gene families can provide an insight into how the evolution of gene structure can relate to function .

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: The data so far suggest that the ancestral TACC protein played a role in centrosomal / mitotic spindle dynamics .

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: The evolution of complex organisms has been associated with the generation of gene families by the continual duplication of an initial relatively small set of ancestral genes .
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Through this process , followed by subsequent mutation , reduplication and exon shuffling between gene families , genes have evolved both discrete , and partially redundant functions with their related family members .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: With the completion of the genome sequencing projects of human , mouse , rat , fruit fly and nematodes , we are now in a position to ask fundamental questions in regard to how genes interact in the context of the whole organism .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O B-Taxon O B-Taxon I-Taxon O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Thus , with the appropriate application of bioinformatics , it is now possible to trace the lineage of particular genes and gene families , with related gene families in other organisms .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: Furthermore , with the growing amount of large - scale proteomic and genomic data becoming publicly available , this analysis can now be extended to reveal the complex interplay between evolution of gene structure and protein function .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: The first Transforming acidic coiled coil gene , TACC1 , was identified during the development of an expression map of the proximal short arm of human chromosome 8 [ 1 ] .
label: O O O B-CHEBI B-SO I-SO B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O

text_a: Two additional TACC family members were subsequently identified and mapped to paralogous chromosomal regions on human chromosomes 4p16 and 10q26 , physically close to members of the FGFR gene family [ 1 - 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-Taxon B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: This mapping data , together with identification of a single TACC gene in the protostomes Caenorhabitis elegans , and Drosophila melanogaster [ 4 - 6 ] , led to the speculation that the ancestral FGFR and TACC genes were located physically close to each other .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon B-Taxon I-Taxon O O B-Taxon I-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O

text_a: Thus , during the evolution of vertebrates , subsequent successive duplications of the ancestral gene cluster have given rise to three TACC family members located close to FGFR genes in humans .
label: O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O B-Taxon O

text_a: In accordance with the proposed quadruplication of the vertebrate genome during evolution , there is a fourth FGFR family member in vertebrates , raising the question of whether a fourth TACC gene is associated with FGFR4 in vertebrate genomes .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon B-SO O

text_a: To date , only three active TACC genes have been cloned in humans [ 1 - 3 ] , one in each of mouse [ 7 ] , Xenopus laevis [ 8 ] , D . melanogaster [ 4 ] , and C . elegans [ 5 , 6 ] .

text_a: Fog2 Is Required for Normal Diaphragm and Lung Development in Mice and Humans
label: B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O B-Taxon

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Congenital diaphragmatic hernia and other congenital diaphragmatic defects are associated with significant mortality and morbidity in neonates ; however , the molecular basis of these developmental anomalies is unknown .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: In an analysis of E18 . 5 embryos derived from mice treated with N - ethyl - N - nitrosourea , we identified a mutation that causes pulmonary hypoplasia and abnormal diaphragmatic development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Fog2 ( Zfpm2 ) maps within the recombinant interval carrying the N - ethyl - N - nitrosourea - induced mutation , and DNA sequencing of Fog2 identified a mutation in a splice donor site that generates an abnormal transcript encoding a truncated protein .
label: B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O B-SO O O B-SO O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Human autopsy cases with diaphragmatic defect and pulmonary hypoplasia were evaluated for mutations in FOG2 .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O

text_a: Sequence analysis revealed a de novo mutation resulting in a premature stop codon in a child who died on the first day of life secondary to severe bilateral pulmonary hypoplasia and an abnormally muscularized diaphragm .
label: B-SO O O O B-SO I-SO B-SO O O O O B-SO I-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Using a phenotype - driven approach , we have established that Fog2 is required for normal diaphragm and lung development , a role that has not been previously appreciated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: FOG2 is the first gene implicated in the pathogenesis of nonsyndromic human congenital diaphragmatic defects , and its necessity for pulmonary development validates the hypothesis that neonates with congenital diaphragmatic hernia may also have primary pulmonary developmental abnormalities .
label: B-GGP O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Birth defects involving the diaphragm are as common and as serious as genetic disorders such as cystic fibrosis , yet the underlying causes of these defects are unknown .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Most babies born with diaphragmatic defects have very small lungs , and many die in the newborn period with severe breathing difficulties .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is unknown whether the small lungs occur because these children have a diaphragmatic defect , or whether some patients might have a genetic abnormality that affects the development of both the lung and the diaphragm simultaneously .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In a screen of fetal mice carrying chemically induced genetic mutations , the authors found that a mutation in the gene Fog2 ( Friend of gata 2 ) , causes abnormal diaphragm development and small lungs .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O B-CHEBI O B-SO B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-SO B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The lungs have a primary developmental abnormality that includes the specific loss of one lung lobe .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Based on this result , the authors studied children affected with diaphragmatic abnormalities , and identified one human baby with a serious mutation in the human gene FOG2 who died at five hours of life with severe breathing difficulties , a diaphragmatic defect , and small lungs .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon B-SO B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The authors have established that Fog2 is necessary for both diaphragm and lung development in mice and in humans .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O

text_a: This is the first known cause of a nonsyndromic congenital diaphragmatic defect and establishes that some patients may have a primary developmental abnormality of both the lung and the diaphragm .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Congenital diaphragmatic defects are a spectrum of relatively common birth defects .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The Bochdalek or posterolateral hernias ( often referred to as congenital diaphragmatic hernia [ CDH ] ) occur in 1 / 3 , 000 live births [ 1 ] , and although these are the most common type of diaphragmatic defect presenting at birth , diaphragmatic aplasia and diaphragmatic muscularization defects ( eventrations ) may have a similar clinical presentation .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Making specific anatomic distinctions among these types of defects can be difficult without direct gross ( intraoperative or postmortem ) examination .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Pulmonary hypoplasia associated with these diaphragmatic defects causes severe mortality and morbidity .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The pathogenesis and developmental relationship between diaphragmatic defects and pulmonary hypoplasia is not understood .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Although advances in the medical management of pulmonary hypoplasia may have decreased the mortality associated with CDH patients who survive to receive care at high - volume centers [ 2 , 3 ] , the population - based mortality has been reported to be as great as 62 % , and there are a large number of deaths prior to birth or to transfer to a tertiary care facility [ 4 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: As these patients commonly present with severe respiratory failure at birth , therapy has been centered around developing better methods to provide ventilatory support while not producing further lung injury .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Extracorporeal membrane oxygenation ( ECMO ) is used in some centers to provide an extended period of cardiopulmonary bypass [ 5 , 6 ] , while other centers have success using other ventilatory support techniques [ 7 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The morbidity in those who survive is high , and many patients survive with chronic respiratory insufficiency , cognitive and neuromotor deficits , and hearing loss as a result of necessary intensive interventions and associated structural and irreversible developmental abnormalities [ 8 - 11 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To date , there have been no specific mutations found to be associated with nonsyndromic diaphragmatic defects and pulmonary hypoplasia in humans .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: The heritability of these defects is unclear , as the high morbidity and mortality limit the collection of multigenerational families for analysis .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The genetic etiologies are likely to be complex and probably arise from different mutations in various parts of the molecular developmental pathways required for diaphragmatic development .
label: O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: Indeed , there are numerous reports implicating different chromosomal abnormalities in the pathogenesis of CDH [ 12 , 13 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Given the difficulty of studying lethal developmental abnormalities in humans , it is of great potential utility to develop animal models of human birth defects , as the specific genetic abnormalities found in animal models can then be investigated in human populations .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: We screened mice treated with the chemical mutagen N - ethyl - N - nitrosourea ( ENU ) for lines with developmental defects that present in the perinatal period [ 14 ] .
label: O O B-Taxon O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: From this screen , we identified a line of mice carrying a recessive mutation that results in primary pulmonary hypoplasia and abnormal diaphragmatic and cardiac development .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Positional cloning analysis identified Fog2 ( Zfpm2 ) as a likely candidate , and DNA sequencing revealed a mutation in a splice donor site that generates an abnormal transcript encoding a truncated protein .
label: B-SO O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-SO O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: This result suggested that we examine the orthologous gene in humans with similar developmental defects , and we report the finding of a de novo nonsense mutation in FOG2 in a patient who died at birth with a diaphragmatic defect and severe pulmonary hypoplasia .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO O B-SO O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This is the first reported mutation associated with these abnormalities in a human .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-Taxon O

text_a: We present additional data that provide direct evidence that pulmonary hypoplasia may be a primary component of this spectrum of disorders .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

label: O

text_a: Congenital diaphragmatic defects are a heterogeneous group of disorders of unknown etiology .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The defects that present in the pre - or perinatal period include Bochdalek hernia , diaphragmatic aplasia , and various degrees of muscularization defects or eventrations .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Clinical differentiation between these defects may be very difficult , as the residual membranous diaphragm of a muscularization defect is thin and may not be easily visible on prenatal ultrasound or postnatal chest radiographs [ 32 ] .

text_a: Although diaphragmatic muscularization defects were historically considered to be predictive of a good outcome , there have been inadequate population - based studies that include fetal or neonatal cases and autopsy diagnoses to make this conclusion definitive .

text_a: Our analysis of mice carrying mutations of Fog2 proves that there is a primary defect in lung development that results in specific loss of the accessory lobe and partial loss of the right middle lobe .

text_a: The specific lobar defects prompted us to evaluate Fog2 expression at the time of early lobar budding .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While Fog2 expression is diffuse in the pulmonary mesenchyme after lobar structure is well established ( E12 . 5 ) , it is more focally expressed in the mesenchyme surrounding the right middle lobe and accessory buds as these lobes form .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This matches the phenotype of right middle lobe and accessory lobe loss , and suggests that Fog2 has a specific patterning role in establishment of these lobes .

text_a: It is less clear whether loss of Fog2 results in a global branching defect , as Fog2 lungs appear to have a slight developmental delay , which could result from many causes .

text_a: Cultured Fog2 lungs do develop an intricate branching pattern in the unaffected lobes that appears similar in the pattern to wild - type lungs after 5 d in culture .
label: O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: In this report , we show that a mutation of Fog2 in the mouse causes the phenotype of abnormal diaphragmatic muscularization and primary pulmonary hypoplasia .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-GGP O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: We furthermore demonstrate that a mutation in this gene is associated with a lethal defect in lung and diaphragm development in a child .

text_a: It is notable that , despite extensive analysis of Fog2 biology and the generation of a Fog2 knock - out mouse , its role in diaphragm and lung development was previously not recognized .

text_a: A Hybrid Photoreceptor Expressing Both Rod and Cone Genes in a Mouse Model of Enhanced S - Cone Syndrome

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Rod and cone photoreceptors subserve vision under dim and bright light conditions , respectively .
label: B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The differences in their function are thought to stem from their different gene expression patterns , morphologies , and synaptic connectivities .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GO O O

text_a: In this study , we have examined the photoreceptor cells of the retinal degeneration 7 ( rd7 ) mutant mouse , a model for the human enhanced S - cone syndrome ( ESCS ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: This mutant carries a spontaneous deletion in the mouse ortholog of NR2E3 , an orphan nuclear receptor transcription factor mutated in ESCS .
label: O B-SO O O O B-SO O O B-Taxon B-SO O B-GGP O O O B-GO O O O B-SO O O O

text_a: Employing microarray and in situ hybridization analysis we have found that the rd7 retina contains a modestly increased number of S - opsin - expressing cells that ultrastructurally appear to be normal cones .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CL O O O O O O B-CL O

text_a: Strikingly , the majority of the photoreceptors in the rd7 retina represent a morphologically hybrid cell type that expresses both rod - and cone - specific genes .
label: O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O O O O B-CL O O O O B-CL O O B-CL O O B-SO O

text_a: In addition , in situ hybridization screening of genes shown to be up - regulated in the rd7 mutant retina by microarray identified ten new cone - specific or cone - enriched genes with a wide range of biochemical functions , including two genes specifically involved in glucose / glycogen metabolism .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-CL O O O B-CL O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O

text_a: We suggest that the abnormal electroretinograms , slow retinal degeneration , and retinal dysmorphology seen in humans with ESCS may , in part , be attributable to the aberrant function of a hybrid photoreceptor cell type similar to that identified in this study .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The functional diversity of the novel cone - specific genes identified here indicates molecular differences between rods and cones extending far beyond those previously discovered .
label: O O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO O O O B-CHEBI O O B-CL O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Vision begins with light entering the eye .
label: O O O O O O O O

text_a: This light is projected onto the retina , a thin neural structure lining the inside of the eye .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Photoreceptors , among the most important cell types in the retina , are the first to receive the incoming rays of light .
label: B-CL O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In mammals , there are two types of photoreceptors : rods and cones .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: Rods are specialized for nighttime vision , and cones for daytime and color vision .
label: B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: In this study , the authors examined the photoreceptors of a mouse with a gene mutation that causes photoreceptors to develop abnormally .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-Taxon O O B-SO B-SO O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: Humans with a similar mutation have a form of blindness called enhanced S - cone syndrome ( ESCS ) .
label: B-Taxon O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O

text_a: Surprisingly , the majority of photoreceptors in this mutant mouse were found to have features of both normal rods and cones .
label: O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: It is possible that the abnormal features of these photoreceptors predispose them to undergo premature death .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O

text_a: If this model accurately reflects the situation in human patients with ESCS , it may provide an explanation for the loss of vision seen in this disease .
label: O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This study also elucidated previously unknown molecular differences between normal rods and cones .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O B-CL O B-CL O

text_a: This new knowledge may contribute to a better overall understanding of the mechanisms underlying night , day , and color vision .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Enhanced S - cone syndrome ( ESCS ) is an unusual disease of photoreceptors that includes night blindness ( suggestive of rod dysfunction ) , an abnormal electroretinogram ( ERG ) with a waveform that is nearly identical under both light and dark adaptation , and an increased sensitivity of the ERG to short - wavelength light [ 1 , 2 ] .
label: O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The disease is caused by mutations in the orphan nuclear receptor transcription factor NR2E3 ( also known as photoreceptor nuclear receptor ) , which is expressed exclusively in rods [ 3 , 4 ] .
label: O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GO O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O

text_a: Recent human genetic studies have also demonstrated mutations in this gene in Goldmann - Favre syndrome and many cases of clumped pigmentary retinal degeneration [ 5 ] .
label: O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O B-SO O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The initial reports of patients with ESCS attributed the unusual ERG to an abnormally functioning rod photoreceptor system with persistent activity under light adaptation [ 6 - 8 ] .

label: O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Electron microscopy .
label: B-CHEBI O O

text_a: This protocol was adapted from one used by Raviola [ 64 ] with some modifications derived from Carter - Dawson and Lavail [ 26 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Four adult wild - type and four mutant animals were deeply anesthetized by intraperitoneal injection of Avertin and the eyes were then removed .
label: O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The cornea was gently punctured with sharp forceps and excised with iridectomy scissors .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The eye was then transferred to a solution of 2 % paraformaldehyde / 2 % glutaraldehyde in cacodylate buffer ( 0 . 1 M cacodylic acid ; 0 . 1 % calcium chloride ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O

text_a: The lens was gently removed and the eyecup allowed to fix for 2 h at room temperature .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The fixed eye was then placed on dental wax and sectioned in the midline with a fresh razor blade ( half of the retinas were sectioned along the D - V axis and half along the nasal - temporal axis ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The retinas ( and attached retinal pigment epithelium ) were carefully dissected away from the sclera , which was discarded .
label: O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The retinas were then rinsed four times for 15 min each with Sorenson ' s buffer ( pH 7 . 4 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: They were then stained for 2 h at 4 degrees C with 1 % osmium tetroxide in 1 . 5 % potassium ferrocyanide .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O

text_a: Next , the retinas were rinsed four times for 15 min in maleate buffer ( pH 5 . 1 ) and then stained for 2 h at room temperature with 1 % uranyl acetate in maleate buffer ( pH 6 . 2 ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: They were then washed four times for 15 min with maleate buffer ( pH 5 . 1 ) ; once for 10 min with 70 % ethanol ; once for 10 min with 95 % ethanol ; and four times for 30 min with 100 % ethanol .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Next , the retinas were washed three times over one hour with propylene oxide and then embedded in TAAB 812 Resin ( Marivac , Quebec , Canada ) for 1 - 2 d in a 60 degrees C oven .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Semi - thin sections were cut at a thickness of 0 . 5 mu m and stained with 1 % toluidine blue in 1 % sodium borate buffer .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O

text_a: Images of semi - thin sections from the mutant retina were taken within the ventral two - thirds of the retina where the majority of the supernumerary S - opsin - expressing cells reside .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O B-CL O O

text_a: Wild - type images were taken in comparable regions .
label: B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O O O O

text_a: Sections for electron microscopy were cut at a thickness of 95 nm , placed on grids , and poststained with 2 % uranyl acetate followed by 0 . 2 % lead citrate .
label: O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O

text_a: All sections were cut in a plane perpendicular to the plane of the photoreceptor layer .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: They were then visualized on a Jeol 1200EX electron microscope ( Jeol , Tokyo , Japan ) .
label: O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The electron microscopic images in Figure 7 derive from the ventral two - thirds of the wild - type and mutant retinas .
label: O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O

text_a: The area of the cell bodies of the rods and rod - like cells in the wild - type and mutant ONLs , respectively , were quantitated in the following manner .
label: O O O O B-GO I-GO O O B-CL O B-CL O O B-CL O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: First , ten fields within the ONL were chosen at random at 1 , 000 x magnification and then photographed at 4 , 000 x magnification for each of the two genotypes .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O

text_a: Such images typically contained 35 - 45 cell bodies .
label: O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O

text_a: In order to quantitate only the area of those cell bodies that were cut as near to the midline of the cell as possible ( i . e . , in order to obtain the maximal cross - sectional area ) the five cells with the largest apparent area in each photograph were chosen by eye and the outline of the cell membranes were traced onto white paper .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O O O

text_a: These tracings were scanned along with the size bar from the electron micrographs , and the areas of the resulting digital images were quantitated using Scion Image software ( NIH Image , http : / / rsb . info . nih . gov / nih - image ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A total of 50 cells of each genotype were quantitated in this manner .
label: O O O O B-CL O O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , in order to evaluate the percentage of rods in the wild - type retina that had any juxtanuclear mitochondria , all rods within all ten images were counted as were the number of cells showing juxtanuclear organelles .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O O B-SO I-SO I-SO O O O O B-GO B-GO O O B-CL O O O O O O O O O O O B-CL O B-GO B-GO O

text_a: A total of six out of 399 wild - type rods ( 1 . 5 % ) possessed a juxtanuclear organelle .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-CL O O O O O O O O B-GO B-GO O

text_a: This analysis permitted us to evaluate the wild - type rods for juxtanuclear mitochondria at multiple planes of section ; however , serial sections of individual cell bodies were not performed .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO I-SO I-SO B-CL O B-GO B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO O O O O

text_a: Production and characterization of murine models of classic and intermediate maple syrup urine disease
label: O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-Taxon O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Maple Syrup Urine Disease ( MSUD ) is an inborn error of metabolism caused by a deficiency of branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O

text_a: MSUD has several clinical phenotypes depending on the degree of enzyme deficiency .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O

text_a: Current treatments are not satisfactory and require new approaches to combat this disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: A major hurdle in developing new treatments has been the lack of a suitable animal model .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Methods
label: O

text_a: To create a murine model of classic MSUD , we used gene targeting and embryonic stem cell technologies to create a mouse line that lacked a functional E2 subunit gene of branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-CL I-CL O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O

text_a: To create a murine model of intermediate MSUD , we used transgenic technology to express a human E2 cDNA on the knockout background .
label: O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O

text_a: Mice of both models were characterized at the molecular , biochemical , and whole animal levels .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Results
label: O

text_a: By disrupting the E2 subunit gene of branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase , we created a gene knockout mouse model of classic MSUD .
label: O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: The homozygous knockout mice lacked branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase activity , E2 immunoreactivity , and had a 3 - fold increase in circulating branched - chain amino acids .
label: O O O B-Taxon O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O

text_a: These metabolic derangements resulted in neonatal lethality .
label: O O O O O O O O

text_a: Transgenic expression of a human E2 cDNA in the liver of the E2 knockout animals produced a model of intermediate MSUD .
label: B-SO O O O B-GGP I-GGP B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase activity was 5 - 6 % of normal and was sufficient to allow survival , but was insufficient to normalize circulating branched - chain amino acids levels , which were intermediate between wildtype and the classic MSUD mouse model .
label: B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O B-SO O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Conclusion
label: O

text_a: These mice represent important animal models that closely approximate the phenotype of humans with the classic and intermediate forms of MSUD .
label: O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These animals provide useful models to further characterize the pathogenesis of MSUD , as well as models to test novel therapeutic strategies , such as gene and cellular therapies , to treat this devastating metabolic disease .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-CL O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Background
label: O

text_a: Maple Syrup Urine Disease ( MSUD ) is a genetic disorder caused by a deficiency of branched - chain keto acid dehydrogenase ( BCKDH ) , a mitochondrial multienzyme complex responsible for the oxidative decarboxylation of branched - chain keto acids derived from branched - chain amino acids ( BCAA ) , leucine , isoleucine and valine ( for review , see : [ 1 ] ) .
label: B-Taxon O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O B-GO O O O B-GO O B-GO O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Patients with MSUD , depending on the mutation , show variable degrees of enzyme deficiency leading to several different clinical phenotypes [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Approximately 75 % of MSUD patients have the classic form of the disease with BCKDH activity in the range of 0 - 2 % of normal [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These patients show markedly elevated levels of BCAA in blood and other body fluids [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Besides the classic form , there are other variants of the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Patients with the intermediate form of the disease show BCKDH activity in the range of 3 - 30 % of normal .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In such patients the onset of the disease is delayed , but there are persistently elevated levels of BCAA [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Patients with the intermittent form of MSUD show BCKDH activity in the range of 5 - 20 % and during the asymptomatic phase the blood BCAA levels are normal [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O

text_a: The overall incidence of MSUD in the general population is 1 : 185 , 000 [ 1 ] , and in certain population groups , such as Mennonites of Pennsylvania , the incidence is estimated to be as high as 1 : 176 [ 2 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The BCKDH complex , the deficient enzyme in MSUD , consists of three catalytic proteins , a decarboxylase ( E1 ) , a dihydrolipoyl transacylase ( E2 ) , and a dihydrolipoyl dehydrogenase ( E3 ) .
label: O B-GO I-GO O O O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O

text_a: The E1 component is a heterotetramer composed of two alpha and two beta subunits [ 3 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O

text_a: The E1 and E2 components are specific to BCKDH , whereas E3 is also used by pyruvate and alpha - ketoglutarate dehydrogenase complexes [ 3 ] and the glycine cleavage system [ 4 ] .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O

text_a: BCKDH is also associated with two regulatory proteins , a specific kinase and a phosphatase which regulate the activity of this enzyme through a phosphorylation ( inactivation ) and dephosphorylation ( activation ) cycle of the E1 alpha subunit [ 5 , 6 ] .
label: B-GO O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Mutations in the genes of the E1 and E2 subunits of BCKDH have been described , however , the majority of MSUD mutations identified thus far are in the E2 subunit [ 1 , 7 ] .
label: B-SO O O B-SO O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: To date , cases of MSUD have not been associated with defects in the regulatory kinase and phosphatase [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Current management of MSUD patients relies on a strict lifelong dietary restriction of protein or BCAA [ 1 , 8 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O O O O

text_a: Such a dietary management of the disease , however , is not entirely satisfactory especially in times of metabolic decompensation due to infection , injuries and other stressors .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In spite of dietary intervention , there is significant mortality associated with MSUD and there is a high incidence of mental retardation in survivors [ 9 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Because of the central role of the liver in amino acid metabolism and moderate / high levels of BCKDH activity in human liver [ 10 - 12 ] , a few cases of MSUD have recently been treated by liver transplantation [ 13 - 16 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O B-GO O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: While the short - term outcome of liver transplantation is encouraging , long - term effects of this approach are not known .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , these patients are now required to take immunosuppressant drugs for the rest of their lives , often with undesirable side effects .
label: O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Moreover , the cost associated with liver transplantation and the availability of donor livers are additional limiting factors for the practicality of treatment of this disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Because of the current unsatisfactory options for the treatment of MSUD , there is a need for improved therapies to combat this disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: An obstacle to developing novel treatments for MSUD has been the lack of a suitable animal model to perform necessary preclinical studies .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O

text_a: Although a Hereford calf model with MSUD has been described [ 17 - 19 ] , this model is neither readily available nor practical to perform preclinical studies .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Furthermore , comparison of this animal model with human MSUD has shown some differences in the pathology of the disease [ 1 ] , making this animal a less desirable model for the human disease .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: Recently , a N - ethyl - N - nitrosourea ( ENU ) - induced mutant mouse that phenotypically resembles human MSUD has been described [ 20 ] .
label: O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI I-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O

text_a: However , the mutation in this model disrupts a splice site in the mitochondrial branched - chain aminotransferase ( BCAT ) gene , not in BCKDH , the deficient enzyme in MSUD .

text_a: Discussion
label: O

text_a: A major hurdle in developing new treatments for MSUD has been the lack of a practical , accurate animal model of the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: This hurdle has now been overcome .
label: O O O O O O O

text_a: In this report , we describe the development and characterization of two genetically engineered mouse models that are phenotypically very similar to MSUD patients with the classic and intermediate forms of the disease .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-SO O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Our model of classic MSUD was created by gene knockout of the E2 subunit of BCKDH .
label: O O O O O O O O B-SO O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: The phenotype of these knockout animals is strikingly similar to humans with classic MSUD .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O B-Taxon O O O O

text_a: Knockout mice were born at the expected frequency and appeared normal at birth .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Within a day of birth and following suckling , blood levels of BCAA were markedly elevated .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O

text_a: Concomitantly , levels of the amino acids alanine , glutamate , and glutamine , whose synthesis is linked with normal metabolism of BCAA , were decreased ( Table 1 ) .
label: O O O O O B-CHEBI I-CHEBI B-CHEBI O B-CHEBI O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O O O O O O O O

text_a: The activity of BCKDH in livers of homozygous knockout mouse pups was undetectable , accounting for the accumulation of unmetabolized BCAA .
label: O O O B-GO O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O B-CHEBI O

text_a: Immunoreactive E2 protein was absent in liver and fibroblasts of homozygous pups .
label: O B-GGP B-CHEBI O O O O O B-CL O O O O

text_a: The phenotypic behavior of homozygous mouse pups resembles symptoms seen in newborn classic MSUD patients .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These include signs of neurologic dysfunction such as seizures , stupor , lethargy , loss of motor activity , and respiratory difficulties [ 1 ] .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Summary
label: O

text_a: ATR - X syndrome is the first human genetic disease known to be caused by mutations in a chromatin remodelling factor .
label: O O B-GO O O O O B-Taxon B-SO O O O O O O B-SO O O B-GO O O O

text_a: At present we do not know how ATRX influences gene expression or what effect it has on cell behaviour .
label: O O O O O O O B-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O O B-CL O O

text_a: Nevertheless , we have previously noted that none of the natural mutations causing ATR - X syndrome are nulls , which suggests that it plays a critical role in normal development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Results of conditional inactivation of Atrx in the developing mouse forebrain , based on the Atrxflox allele described here , shows that Atrx exerts a major effect on terminally differentiating neurons .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O B-SO O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O B-CL O

text_a: Conditional inactivation of Atrx in other tissues is underway .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O O O

text_a: Here we have shown that animal - wide disruption of the Atrx gene causes a severe embryonic - lethal phenotype , revealing an essential role for Atrx in the formation of the murine trophoblast .
label: O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O

text_a: In addition , Atrx appears to escape imprinted X - chromosome inactivation in the extraembryonic tissues of some carrier female mice .
label: O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GO I-GO I-GO O O O O O O O O O B-Taxon O

label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Abstract
label: O

text_a: The tumor suppressor gene Apc ( adenomatous polyposis coli ) is a member of the Wnt signaling pathway that is involved in development and tumorigenesis .
label: O O O B-SO B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Heterozygous knockout mice for Apc have a tumor predisposition phenotype and homozygosity leads to embryonic lethality .
label: O O B-Taxon O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: To understand the role of Apc in development we generated a floxed allele .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O B-SO B-SO O

text_a: These mice were mated with a strain carrying Cre recombinase under the control of the human Keratin 14 ( K14 ) promoter , which is active in basal cells of epidermis and other stratified epithelia .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-SO O O O O O O B-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL I-CL O

text_a: Mice homozygous for the floxed allele that also carry the K14 - cre transgene were viable but had stunted growth and died before weaning .
label: B-Taxon O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Histological and immunochemical examinations revealed that K14 - cre - mediated Apc loss resulted in aberrant growth in many ectodermally derived squamous epithelia , including hair follicles , teeth , and oral and corneal epithelia .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: In addition , squamous metaplasia was observed in various epithelial - derived tissues , including the thymus .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The aberrant growth of hair follicles and other appendages as well as the thymic abnormalities in K14 - cre ; ApcCKO / CKO mice suggest the Apc gene is crucial in embryonic cells to specify epithelial cell fates in organs that require epithelial - mesenchymal interactions for their development .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-Taxon O O B-GGP B-SO O O O O B-CL O O B-CL I-CL O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: Synopsis
label: O

text_a: Patients with familial adenomatous polyposis ( FAP ) and its variant , Gardner ' s syndrome , will develop hundreds of colorectal polyps .
label: O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: It is a heritable disease that is linked to a genetic mutation in the tumor suppressor gene APC ( adenomatous polyposis coli ) .
label: O O O O O O O O O O B-SO B-SO O O O O B-SO B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O

text_a: These individuals also develop extracolonic symptoms , among which are congenital hypertrophy of the retinal pigment epithelium , desmoid tumors , epidermoid cysts , disorders of the maxillary and skeletal bones , and dental abnormalities , suggesting the importance of APC functions in these organs .
label: O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O

text_a: To understand the role of Apc in development and in organs other than intestine , we generated Apc mutant mice that can conditionally delete the gene when exposed to Cre recombinase .
label: O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO B-Taxon O O O B-SO O B-SO O O O O O O

text_a: These mice were mated with K14 ( Keratin 14 ) - cre mice that express Cre recombinase in skin and its appendages .
label: O B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O B-GGP I-GGP O O O B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: The authors found that the mutant mice that have lost Apc in K14 - cre transgene - expressing tissues were viable , but had stunted growth and died before weaning .
label: O O O O O B-SO B-Taxon O O O B-GGP O B-GGP O O B-SO O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: These mutant mice showed developmental abnormalities not only in skin but also in many epithelial - derived tissues , including teeth and thymus .
label: O B-SO B-Taxon O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O

text_a: This work demonstrates the importance of Apc in development of many organs , and provides new insights into diagnosis and management of patients with APC mutations .
label: O O O O O O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP B-SO O

text_a: Introduction
label: O

text_a: Adenomatous polyposis coli ( APC ) is a member of the Wnt signaling pathway and one of its known functions is to regulate the levels of beta - catenin .
label: B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O B-GGP O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O

text_a: Alterations in beta - catenin regulation are very common in human tumors [ 1 ] .
label: O O B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O B-Taxon O O O O O

text_a: Loss of APC is associated with stabilization of the cytosolic beta - catenin that ultimately results in its migration to the nucleus and activating a cascade of events leading to tumorigenesis .
label: O O B-GGP O O O O O O B-GO B-GGP I-GGP I-GGP O O O O O O O O B-GO O O O O O O O O O O
